Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Efedrit.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 9.

Quest Text

Description

Land on Argenon in Cynapsian and kidnap a Nezerian soldier from an enemy fortress .

Completion

Krux: “You are bzzzt lucky today, we found one outside when he was doing a bzrtzz, gagged and ready to be eaten!”

Crew: “This doesn’t seem right...”

Krux: “Sponge is the main purpose in life.. I tell you..bzz”
